deliverable_created.visual_intent: Premium, warm, calm, adult fintech guidance; clear enough to orient the user without looking like a dashboard, checkout, flat timeline or data form.

layout_structure.container: Wide centered section with warm neutral background, generous whitespace and a bounded content area.
layout_structure.header_zone: Left-aligned or centered title/subtitle block explaining that the path helps the user understand the next steps before checking an offer.
layout_structure.main_visual_zone: Progressive path/map composition with 3 to 4 milestone cards connected by a soft curved path, not a flat horizontal timeline.
layout_structure.cta_zone: Single primary CTA placed after the path narrative, visually dominant but not aggressive.
layout_structure.trust_note_zone: Small low-emphasis note stating that any offer or alternative is referential and subject to validation.

visual_hierarchy: Title first: Tu Ruta de Claridad.
Subtitle second: explains orientation without selling certainty.
Path/map third: shows progression through clarity steps.
CTA fourth: Ver si tengo una oferta.
Trust/legal note fifth: referential and subject to validation.

components.name: Section heading
components.purpose: Anchor the section and avoid ambiguity.

components.name: Progressive path/map
components.purpose: Represent guidance as a journey, not a process checklist.
requirements: no step numbers that feel like checkout

components.name: Milestone cards
components.purpose: Explain the path without asking data.

components.name: Primary CTA
requirements: label: Ver si tengo una oferta

recommended_milestones.label: Ordena tu punto de partida
recommended_milestones.intent: User understands this starts with clarity, not commitment.

recommended_milestones.label: Revisa alternativas referenciales
recommended_milestones.intent: User understands alternatives are exploratory, not guaranteed.

recommended_milestones.label: Avanza al simulador
recommended_milestones.intent: User understands the next action is /simulador.

recommended_milestones.label: Decide con más claridad
recommended_milestones.intent: User understands the outcome is better orientation, not promised approval.

style_requirements.accent_color: minimal warm gold only for progress or goal detail
style_requirements.cards: soft radius, light shadow, premium but simple

negative_constraints: Do not show a simulator form inside the section.
Do not request DNI, income, phone, debt amount or sensitive data.
Do not show a guaranteed offer, approval, savings or amount.
Do not create dashboard cards, analytics charts or account widgets.
Do not use a flat timeline, checkout steps or childish gamification.
Do not add urgency, countdowns, fear, pressure or success promises.
Do not mark as Golden Screen, production or validated.

states.default: All milestones visible; CTA enabled; referential note present.
states.hover: CTA and milestone cards may lift subtly; no new information or hidden promise appears.
states.focus: CTA must have accessible focus state.
states.reduced_motion: Path connector remains static; no animation required.

render_prompt_handoff.instruction: Use this UI spec as the source for a desktop 16:9 light-mode mockup prompt. The prompt must show only this section or a focused Home slice where this section is protagonist.

acceptance_criteria: The section is immediately recognizable as an orientation path toward /simulador.
The CTA Ver si tengo una oferta is the only dominant action.
No data fields, amounts, guarantees, dashboard metrics or simulator widgets appear.
The path feels premium and adult, not playful or infantilized.
The visual hierarchy remains clear at desktop 16:9.
A referential/subject-to-validation note is visible but not visually dominant.
